text:
PRVDR_AGE 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 3 

FILE(S): APR base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual provider TAF 

VALUES: Numeric value representing provider age, or null/missing. 

COMMENT: Applicable to individual providers only; derived from the same monthly base record as the most recent 
value of PRVDR_ENT_TYPE_CD in the calendar year. 

If PRVDR_AGE is greater than 125, then PRVDR_AGE is set to 125. 
 ^ Back to TOC ^
